name: padkit-web
description: Zero-install WebHID config tool for the PadKit CH552 macropad — live-edit LEDs, brightness and keymap, then save to the pad's flash. No backend.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings src/selftest.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings src/isp.selftest.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings src/flash.selftest.ts
